title: Survival school
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Survival schools''' were institutions found on several worlds across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], helping youngsters learn survival traits for later life.

[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] attended a survival school during his youth on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], where he was taught to view dangerous situations as objectively as possible. He attempted to use this thinking during a confrontation with the [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] [[URoRRuR'R'R|URoRRoR'R'R]], though he found he was unable to bring these teachings to bear, and instead fainted in the face of danger.

One of the more notable of these organizations was the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]] founded by [[Barosa Warren]] on the planet [[Thrantin|OM813]]. It ensured students learned survival skills in environments that would pose a challenge to their species' particular physiology; for example, a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] student would learn how to survive in arid areas such as deserts.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars: A New Hope'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: A New Hope (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
